_comment: Sapia.ai Claude Desktop MCP Configuration Template
_note: Replace all placeholder values (marked ...) with real credentials. Store actual credentials in environment variables or a secrets manager - never commit API keys to shared storage.
_salesforce_note: Salesforce intentionally excluded from this config to prevent customer data exposure. Add only if your IT team has reviewed and approved.

salesloft._comment: Native SalesLoft MCP - requires Agentic package. Admin must enable in SalesLoft admin panel first.

hubspot._comment: Official HubSpot MCP - OAuth 2.0. Set up via HubSpot app marketplace.

lusha._comment: Official Lusha MCP. Get API key from Lusha API Hub -> API -> Manage API Keys.

gong._comment: Gong MCP. Get Access Key and Secret from Gong Settings -> API. Used for voice matching and calibration.

slack._comment: Official Slack MCP. Authenticate via Claude Desktop -> Customize -> Connectors or directly here.

brave-search._comment: Brave Search for open-web research by the Research Analyst. Get API key at brave.com/search/api

filesystem._comment: Filesystem MCP - grants agents read/write access to the Knowledge Vault. Update the path to match your local vault location.
